schema_validation_note: Lightweight grounding of BidPoison fields against public procurement/e-invoicing schemas. This is not a full conformance test.

sources.name: Peppol BIS Billing 3.0
sources.use: Invoice verification, auditing, payment, buyer references, invoice line descriptions, attached documents

sources.name: OASIS Universal Business Language 2.1
sources.use: Invoice and Order document models, XML schema-based business document validation

coverage_claim.invoice_approval: Grounded in Peppol/UBL invoice, buyer reference, seller party, monetary total, and invoice line concepts.
coverage_claim.contract_renewal: Partially grounded in contract/document reference concepts; clauses remain synthetic text.
coverage_claim.vendor_selection: Partially grounded in item and party descriptors; RFQ scoring fields are benchmark-specific.
coverage_claim.supplier_risk_assessment: Benchmark-specific risk fields, not directly covered by invoice schemas.
